expectations.text: ponder.config.ts reads deployedContracts from SE-2 nextjs package
expectations.evidence: Imports deployedContracts from '../nextjs/contracts/deployedContracts' and dynamically builds contract config from it

expectations.text: ponder.config.ts reads scaffoldConfig for network detection
expectations.evidence: Imports scaffoldConfig from '../nextjs/scaffold.config' and uses targetNetworks[0] for chain config

expectations.text: Package named @se-2/ponder following SE-2 workspace convention
Uses Ponder virtual module imports (ponder:registry, ponder:schema, ponder:api)
expectations.evidence: Handler: import from 'ponder:registry' and 'ponder:schema'. API: import from 'ponder:api' and 'ponder:schema'

expectations.text: Schema uses onchainTable (not older createSchema API)
expectations.evidence: import { onchainTable } from 'ponder' — correct v0.7+ API

expectations.text: Hono-based API setup for GraphQL (not old express-style)
expectations.evidence: const app = new Hono(); app.use('/graphql', graphql({ db, schema })) — correct v0.7+ Hono pattern

expectations.text: Root package.json has ponder proxy scripts
expectations.evidence: Root has ponder:dev, ponder:start, ponder:codegen and other proxy scripts
packages/ponder/ponder-env.d.ts created for virtual module type support
